variants: Linn Bergheim currently resides in Currantgrove Flats, having originally come from Riverreed Village. Her expertise in technology led her to earn the prestigious Ivory Spire Certification, demonstrating her skill and dedication to her field. Among her achievements is the Thundertide Conductor Module, an invention that has made significant contributions to renewable energy. In her spare time, Linn is an involved member of the Harborleaf Diarists Club, where she shares her passion for writing and storytelling with a community of like-minded individuals.
